# Security.RequirementsForPrinciple method

Returns every §28 requirement that derives from a given core principle, in spec order (spec R-28.1-a).

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<SecurityRequirement> RequirementsForPrinciple(string principle)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| principle | One of the four core principles. |

## Return Value

The per-principle slice of the baseline.
